prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 海南省综合类2024年最低位次约275名，2025年升至约205名，前移约70名，显示报考热度明显上升，竞争加剧；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2 024年2人、2025年2人，2026年增至3人，扩招50%，扩招幅度较大，有利于降低录取难度。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学医学院隶属于浙江大学（985、211、双一流），软科 主榜排名全国第3，属顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年浙江大学声誉评价为偏负面，涉及学术不端、师德师风等舆情；但抖音热度排名第14（高 热），短视频曝光量大，整体关注度仍处高位；临床医学A、基础医学A-、药学A+，医学学科实力全国顶尖，招生专业（临床医学、口腔医学）均对应强势学科 ，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024年专业热度推荐（70.19），口腔医学推荐（72.31），医学类专业持续偏热；海南省考生总数2021年52977人增至2025 年67408人，2026年预估约78000人，考生规模持续扩大，竞争基数增加，整体平稳略升；浙江大学位于浙江省杭州 市，属东部发达地区，对海南考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在海南招生计划极少（2-3人），属于稀缺名额，位次波动受个别高分考生报考行为影响较大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2 025年位次前移趋势、2026年扩招50%的利好、考生总数持续增长带来的竞争加剧、医学专业热度偏热及声誉偏负面等因素，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，预计2026年最低录取位次较20 25年略有后移。预测最低位次约270名，区间220-320名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 浙江大学医学院在海南省仅设一个专业组（医学试验班类），包含临床医学和口腔医学两个方向，位次在预测区间（220-320名）内可积极报考；位次优于区间上限（<220名）录 取把握较大；位次接近区间下限（约320名）可尝试冲刺。两专业均为医学类热门方向，无显著难度梯度，建议以整体位次判断为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking for Hainan Comprehensive category in 2024 was approximately 275, rising to about 205 in 2025, moving forward by about 70 places, indicating a significant increase in application popularity and intensified competition; the enrollment plan for this university in Hainan Comprehensive category was 2 in 2024, 2 in 2025, and increased to 3 in 2026, an expansion of 50%, which is a relatively large expansion and conducive to lowering admission difficulty.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University School of Medicine is affiliated with Zhejiang University (985, 211, Double First-Class), ranking 3rd nationally on the Soft Science main list, belonging to the top-tier university level, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; in 2026, Zhejiang University's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct, teacher ethics, and other public opinion; but Douyin popularity ranks 14th (high heat), with large short video exposure, overall attention remains high; Clinical Medicine A, Basic Medicine A-, Pharmacy A+, medical discipline strength is top nationally, admission majors (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology) correspond to strong disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine 2024 major popularity recommendation (70.19), Stomatology recommendation (72.31), medical majors continue to be relatively hot; the total number of candidates in Hainan Province increased from 52,977 in 2021 to 67,408 in 2025, estimated at about 78,000 in 2026, the candidate scale continues to expand, the competition base increases, overall stable and slightly rising; Zhejiang University is located in Hangzhou City, Zhejiang Province, an eastern developed region, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Hainan candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Hainan is very small (2-3 people), belonging to scarce slots, ranking fluctuations are greatly affected by the application behavior of individual high-scoring candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the trend of ranking moving forward in 2025, the favorable factor of 50% expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to continuous growth in total candidates, the relatively hot popularity of medical majors, and the somewhat negative reputation, the expansion rate is greater than the candidate growth rate, so the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly backward compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 270, range 220-320.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Zhejiang University School of Medicine only has one major group (Medical Experimental Class) in Hainan Province, including Clinical Medicine and Stomatology directions; candidates with rankings within the predicted range (220-320) can actively apply; those with rankings better than the upper limit of the range (<220) have a higher chance of admission; those with rankings near the lower limit of the range (about 320) can try to take a chance. Both majors are popular directions in medicine, with no significant difficulty gradient, so it is recommended to judge mainly based on overall ranking.
